title: UltraDEX Daily Oral Rinse Whitening, 500 ml (Pack of 2)

features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Instantly eliminates bad breath (Halitosis) for 12 hours of fresh breath
Clinically proven to treat the root cause, remove bacteria & neutralise VSCs
Whitens and protects teeth, enamel & gums from plaque build-up
Free from alcohol, sugar, sulphates, SLS and chlorhexidine
Dentist developed and recommended for 30+ years
description: Product Description It’s time to treat the root cause of bad breath, not just mask it! UltraDEX Daily Oral Rinse is clinically proven to instantly eliminate bad breath compounds (Volatile Sulphur Compounds known as VSCs) for 12 hours of fresh breath confidence. IQ+ ActiveOxi Technology, Stabilised Chlorine Dioxide (SCD) and Fluoride MFP instantly tackle the underlying cause of bad breath instead of simply masking odour. SensiShield Enamel Defense helps whiten teeth and prevents plaque buildup which can cause cavities. This alcohol-free mouth wash also delivers a soothing whole care approach, protecting teeth and gums as it restores natural whiteness by gently lifting stains from food, coffee, tea and other beverages, without a burning sensation. UltraDEX is free from alcohol, gluten, sugar and chlorhexidine and is safe for long term daily use by all the family (suitable for children aged 6+). It is registered with the Vegan Society. For a total fresh breath and oral care program, use with UltraDEX Toothpaste, 12hr Fresh Breath Spray, and Interdental Tape or Brushes. Use in the morning and in the evening for 12 hours of fresh breath confidence, exceptional oral health, and naturally whiter teeth. Rinse for 30 seconds, then spit. Do not swallow and do not rinse with water. Ingredients Aqua, Hydroxyapatite, Glycerin, PEG-60 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Polysorbate 20, Sodium Monofluorophosphate, Aroma, Cellulose Gum, Sodium Saccharin, Trisodium Phosphate, Sodium Chlorite, Menthone Glycerin Acetal, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Citrate, Citric Acid, Gellan Gum, Sodium Bicarbonate, Limonene. Contains Sodium Monofluorophosphate (660ppm Fluoride) Directions Shake well before each use. Use 15ml (3x5ml teaspoonfuls) both morning and night, either before or after brushing. Rinse for 30 seconds and do not swallow. Do not rinse with water after use. Safety Warning Caution: Do not swallow. Not suitable for children 6 years and under. Do not store in direct sunlight. Do not use if cellophane wrap has been tampered with. See more
